PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERT CHARLES FORTUNE III AS DAMAGES THE AMOUNT OF $8,174.67, PLUS COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-05-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
